description_long: This bench features a rustic design with four thick, rounded wooden slats forming the backrest and three similar slats making up the seat. The slats are painted a deep reddish-brown and are fastened together with visible white bolts, giving the bench a handcrafted, log-cabin appearance. The legs are robust and slightly curved, painted in a light gray color, and appear to be made of a different material, possibly metal or painted wood, for added stability. The bench has no armrests, and the seat and backrest slats are slightly uneven, enhancing its organic, natural look. The construction suggests durability and suitability for outdoor environments such as parks or gardens. The overall form is simple yet sturdy, with a focus on function and a touch of whimsical, playful design.
description: A rustic bench with thick, reddish-brown wooden slats and sturdy, curved gray legs, fastened with white bolts. The design is organic and handcrafted, ideal for outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the seat and backrest slats, with all bolts and both legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved profile of the seat and backrest, and the thickness of the slats.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the slats and the attachment points for the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the curvature and layered arrangement of the slats.
